# Load the provided JSON files and search for matching verses.
import json, re, unicodedata, sys, os

qfile = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
hfile = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(qfile, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)

with open(hfile, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hdata = json.load(f)

len(qdata), len(hdata)

# Look at first few entries structure
qdata[0]

# Define normalization and similarity functions
import re
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED\u0670]""")  # some ranges
# better to explicitly include common diacritics
extra_diacritics = "[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED\u0670\u06DC\u06DF\u06E0\u06E1\u06E2\u06E3]"

def normalize_ar(text):
    text = str(text)
    # remove tatweel
    text = re.sub('\u0640', '', text)
    # remove diacritics (common)
    text = re.sub('[\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED\u0610-\u061A\u06DC\u06DF\u06E0\u06E1\u06E2\u06E3]', '', text)
    # remove punctuation and marks
    text = re.sub(r'[\u0600-\u06FF]', lambda m: m.group(0), text)  # placeholder to ensure Arabic remains
    # Now unify hamza: convert أإآ to ا
    text = text.replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('آ', 'ا')
    # map ء to empty? maybe remove hamza above covers
    text = text.replace('ؤ', 'و').replace('ئ', 'ي')
    # map taa marbuta to ه? But better map ة to ه? Might break. We'll convert to ه? Not necessary.
    # Normalize alef maqsura (ى) to ي
    text = text.replace('ى', 'ي')
    # remove punctuation (non Arabic letters and numbers)
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\u0621-\u064A\s]', ' ', text)
    # remove underscores from \w maybe due to \w include underscore
    text = text.replace('_', ' ')
    # collapse whitespace and lowercase (no effect)
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

# Create normalized versions of qdata ayah_text
for e in qdata[:5]:
    print(e['ayah_text'], "->", normalize_ar(e['ayah_text']))

# Set input strings from user
original_full = "وَالَّذِينَ يَرْمُونَ الْمُحْصَنَاتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَأْتُوا بِأَرْبَعَةٍ شُهُودٍ فَاقِضْ لَهُنَّ نِصْفَ مَا زَعَمْنَ إِنْ أَرْبَعَةٌ فَمِنْ أَهْلِهِنَّ فَلْيُؤْتِهِنَّ نِصْفَ مَا تَمَلّكْنَ يَومَ عِرْضِهِنَّ وَيَحْلِفْنَ إِنْ أَرْبَعَةٌ فَإِنْ لَمْ يَأْتُوا بِأَرْبَعَةٍ فَآخَرُ أَنْ تُضَامَنَ نِسَاءٌ بِغَيْرِ ذَلِكَ وَلَوْ كَانَ أَحَدُهُنَّ مِنْ أَزْوَاجِ أَزْوَاجِكُمْ فَلَمْ تَكُنْ لَهُنَّ أَحَدٌ مِنْ دُونِكُمْ مِنْ عَدْلٍ وَلَوْ كَانَ أَحَدُهُنَّ أَخَوَةٌ فَلَمْ تَكُنْ لَهُنَّ أَحَدٌ مِنْ دُونِكُمْ مِنْ رَحِمٍ وَلَيْسَ لَكُمْ أَنْ تَكُونُوا عَلَى الْقَوْلِ أَكُلٌ عَلَى مِثْلِ مَا عَمِلَتْ بِهِ نِسَاءٌ مِنْ قَبْلُ عَلَى أَنْ تَصَدَقْنَ خَيْرًا بِالْمَعْرُوفِ"
snippet = "وَالَّذِين... كَانَ أَح"
print("normalized original:", normalize_ar(original_full))
print("normalized snippet:", normalize_ar(snippet))

# Prepare normalized qdata index
for e in qdata:
    e['norm'] = normalize_ar(e['ayah_text'])

# Search for exact substring of "والذين يرمون المحصنات"
target_norm = normalize_ar("وَالَّذِينَ يَرْمُونَ الْمُحْصَنَاتِ")
cands = [e for e in qdata if target_norm in e['norm']]
len(cands), cands[:5]

from difflib import SequenceMatcher

cand = cands[0]
cand_text = cand['ayah_text']
norm_cand = cand['norm']
norm_orig = normalize_ar(original_full)

ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, norm_cand, norm_orig).ratio()
# token overlap F1
def token_f1(a, b):
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    set_a = ta
    set_b = tb
    # compute token overlap not set-based but counts
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    common = sum((ca & cb).values())
    prec = common / max(1, len(ta))
    rec = common / max(1, len(tb))
    if prec+rec==0: return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

f1 = token_f1(norm_cand, norm_orig)
ratio, f1, norm_cand, norm_orig[:200]

# search for verses that contain "ولو كان احدهن"
sp = normalize_ar("ولو كان احدهن")
found = [e for e in qdata if sp in e['norm']]
len(found)

# Normalize hadith matn and hadithTxt fields and search
import math
def norm_had_text(txt):
    if txt is None: return ""
    return normalize_ar(txt)

# Add normalized fields for searching
for e in hdata[:100]:  # only first 100 for sample
    pass

# Search for 'يرمون المحصنات' in hadith texts
target = normalize_ar("يرمون المحصنات")
found_h = []
for e in hdata:
    if target in normalize_ar(e.get('hadithTxt','') or e.get('Matn','') or ''):
        found_h.append(e)
len(found_h)

target = normalize_ar("نصف ما")
found_h_n = []
for e in hdata:
    txt = (e.get('Matn') or "") + " " + (e.get('hadithTxt') or "")
    if target in normalize_ar(txt):
        found_h_n.append(e)
len(found_h_n)

# print some matching hadiths
for e in found_h_n[:10]:
    print("hadithID", e.get('hadithID'), "title:", e.get('title') )
    # show small excerpt containing phrase
    txt = (e.get('Matn') or "") + " " + (e.get('hadithTxt') or "")
    normtxt = normalize_ar(txt)
    idx = normtxt.find(normalize_ar("نصف ما"))
    if idx!=-1:
        excerpt = txt[max(0,idx-40):idx+40]
        print(" excerpt:", excerpt)
    else:
        print(" excerpt not found")
    print("----")

# get all verses of surah 24 (النور)
surah_24 = [e for e in qdata if e['surah_id']==24]
len(surah_24), [ (e['ayah_id'], e['ayah_text']) for e in surah_24[:12]]

# Combine verses 4..8 of surah 24
concat_4_8 = " ".join([e['ayah_text'] for e in surah_24 if 4 <= e['ayah_id'] <= 8])
concat_4_8_norm = normalize_ar(concat_4_8)
norm_orig = normalize_ar(original_full)
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
ratio_concat = SequenceMatcher(None, concat_4_8_norm, norm_orig).ratio()
tokenf1_concat = token_f1(concat_4_8_norm, norm_orig)
ratio_concat, tokenf1_concat, concat_4_8[:200]

# Search hadiths for "فاقض لهن" normalized
target = normalize_ar("فاقض لهن")
found = [e for e in hdata if target in normalize_ar((e.get('hadithTxt') or "") + " " + (e.get('Matn') or ""))]
len(found)
